name: Audience Reach
description: The potential number of viewers that can be reached through the platform.
sources: Platform Statistics, Similarweb, Various sources based on platform analytics and reports

name: Audience Size
description: Potential reach based on the platform's user base.
sources: Various sources reporting platform user statistics, various

name: Audience Size/Reach
description: Potential audience size and platform reach, considering active user base.
sources: Facebook Insights, Facebook Live, Instagram Live, Streams Charts, TikTok Live, Various sources depending on platform. e.g, YouTube Analytics, YouTube Live

name: Ease of Use
description: How user-friendly the app is for beginners and experienced streamers.
sources: App reviews and comparisons, Expert Reviews, Expert reviews, Facebook Live, Go Live, Prism Live Studio, StreamYard, User Reviews, User reviews, app descriptions, expert reviews, user reviews

name: Features
description: Variety and quality of tools and functionalities offered, such as chat, alerts, overlays, multistreaming, and analytics.
sources: App descriptions, App descriptions and feature lists, Expert reviews, app descriptions, tech reviews

name: Mobile Optimization
description: Optimized for mobile streaming and viewing.
sources: App descriptions, Facebook, TikTok Live, YouTube, user reviews

name: Monetization Options
description: The availability and variety of methods for creators to earn revenue from their live streams (e.g., ads, subscriptions, donations).
sources: App descriptions, App documentation, Bigo Live, JWP, Platform Features, Platform descriptions, Platform documentation, Stream, TikTok Live, Twitch, User Reviews, User reviews, Various sources discussing monetization strategies for live streaming apps, YouTube Live, platform terms, user reports, user reviews, user testimonials

name: Multi-Platform Streaming
description: The ability to simultaneously broadcast to multiple platforms.
sources: Platform Specifications, Prism Live Studio, Restream, Streamlabs, User Manuals

name: Platform Compatibility
description: Whether the app is available on iOS, Android, and/or desktop.
sources: App description, App store listings and developer information, app stores, developer websites
